name: Pennsylvania Dutch Corn Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, beat together egg yolk and granulated sugar.
2. Using a wooden spoon, stir in the frozen whole-kernel corn (thawed), canned cream-style corn, all-purpose flour, chopped chives, salt, and pepper; mix until well combined.
3. In a small mixing bowl, using an electric mixer, beat egg white until stiff but not dry. Gently fold into the corn mixture.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Drop batter by 1/4 cup measures into the hot oil, forming 6 equal fritters.
6. Cook the fritters until golden on the bottom, about 1 minute.
7. Using a pancake turner, carefully flip the fritters over and cook until golden on the other side, about 1 more minute.
8. Serve immediately. Makes 6 servings of 1 fritter each.
